历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University in the Physics Category in Liaoning Province were approximately 1816, 1793, 1843, 1764, and 2000 respectively. Over the past 5 years, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 1764 and 2000. In 2025, the ranking (2000) shifted back by about 236 places compared to 2024 (1764), marking the lowest level in 5 years, indicating a decline in application enthusiasm in 2025. The enrollment plan for Wuhan University in the Physics Category in Liaoning Province: 57 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 60 in 2025, and 57 in 2026. The 2026 plan reduces by 3 students compared to 2025 (a 5% reduction), which will intensify competition and theoretically push the ranking number smaller.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In 2026, it ranked 8th (Top 10) in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in China, with a very high level and sustained appeal to high-scoring students. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'somewhat negative', with 64 negative events out of 99 total events, mainly involving campus safety incidents, teacher ethics controversies, and school management responses, which may somewhat suppress the application psychology of some students. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure, but the comprehensive popularity ranking did not enter the top 10. The 2023 admission anomaly file is marked as 'high attention', but no obvious gap record appeared. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Wuhan University has 4 A+ disciplines (Law, Marxist Theory, Geophysics, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines (Chinese Language and Literature, Biology, Business Administration, Water Conservancy Engineering), and 12 A- disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Geography, Stomatology, Journalism and Communication, etc.), totaling 20 A- and above, with strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Liaoning is about 200,000. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 71.8%, it is estimated to be about 144,000, roughly the same as the 143,000 in 2025, with a stable number of candidates. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the Central China region, not in Liaoning Province or a neighboring province, but as a national top-tier 985, its cross-provincial appeal is strong. The enrollment plan in Liaoning is stable between 56 and 60 students, with 57 in 2026, a moderate enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation of historical rankings, the 5% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the possible slight suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation, and the sustained appeal of the school's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2000, the reduction effect and reputation suppression roughly offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be about 2020, with a range of 1792 to 2248.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Carbon Neutrality Self-Improvement Class)
- Physics Class
- Big Data Management and Application
- Chemistry Class
- Biological Science Class
- Stomatology (5-year).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1792 to 2248, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Class, Remote Sensing, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Hongyi Class, Computer Class, Artificial Intelligence) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Physics Class, Chemistry Class, etc.) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1772), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2228), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University in the History Category in Liaoning Province were approximately 202, 237, 373, 234, and 340 respectively. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past 5 years (202–373), with the 2025 ranking (340) shifting back about 106 places compared to 2024 (234), showing an overall fluctuating backward trend. The enrollment plan for Wuhan University in the History Category in Liaoning Province: 12 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 14 in 2025, and 12 in 2026. The 2026 plan reduces by 2 compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 14.3%), a significant contraction that will notably intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranked 8th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with an extremely high level, continuously attracting top History Category candidates. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'somewhat negative', with 64 negative out of 99 total events, involving campus safety, teacher ethics, etc., which may somewhat suppress some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 19th overall (high heat), with high exposure. The 2023 admission anomaly is marked as 'high attention', but no obvious gap appeared. Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines related to History Category are outstanding: Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Journalism and Communication A-, Marxist Theory A+, Philosophy (not individually rated but strong), with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not within Liaoning Province, but as a top national comprehensive university, its cross-provincial appeal is strong. The History Category enrollment plan has been stable at 12–16 in recent years, with 12 in 2026 being a relatively low level, making competition relatively intense. In 2026, the total number of Liaoning college entrance exam takers is about 200,000, with an estimated 56,400 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 28.2%, roughly flat with the 2025 History Category count of 56,300.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 14.3% enrollment reduction in 2026 significantly intensifying competition, the negative reputation possibly slightly suppressing application heat, and the continuous attraction of the school's top tier and advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 340, the contraction effect is slightly stronger than the reputation suppression. The predicted minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 is approximately 345, with a range of 295–395.

- Chinese Language and Literature.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 295–395, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Journalism and Communication, Chinese Language and Literature) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Law, Hongyi College) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (History, Sociology) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<290), focus on sprinting for top majors like Law; if the ranking is close to the upper bound (>390), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup.
